inputs.label: Known Cards
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards you have seen, including your hole cards and any community cards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cards you have seen, including your hole cards and any community cards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gördüğünüz kart sayısı, kapalı kartlarınız ve topluluk kartları dahil.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der gesehenen Karten, einschließlich Ihrer Hole Cards und aller Gemeinschaftskarten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes que vous avez vues, incluant vos cartes fermées et les cartes communes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas que has visto, incluyendo tus cartas privadas y cualquier carta comunitaria.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد البطاقات التي رأيتها، بما في ذلك بطاقاتك الشخصية وأي بطاقات مشتركة.

inputs.label: Deck Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of cards in the deck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of cards in the deck.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de cartes dans le jeu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de cartas en el mazo.

inputs.label: Outs
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards in the remaining deck that will improve your hand to a winner.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cards in the remaining deck that will improve your hand to a winner.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalan destede elinizi kazanan yapacak kart sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Karten im verbleibenden Deck, die Ihre Hand zu einem Gewinner verbessern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes dans le paquet restant qui amélioreront votre main pour gagner.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas en el mazo restante que mejorarán tu mano para ganar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد البطاقات في المجموعة المتبقية التي ستحسن يدك لتصبح فائزة.

inputs.label: Cards to Draw
inputs.businessContext: Number of upcoming community cards to be dealt (e.g., 1 for turn only, 2 for turn and river).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of upcoming community cards to be dealt (e.g., 1 for turn only, 2 for turn and river).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dağıtılacak gelecek topluluk kartı sayısı (örneğin, sadece dönüş için 1, dönüş ve nehir için 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der noch auszuteilenden Gemeinschaftskarten (z.B. 1 nur für Turn, 2 für Turn und River).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes communes à venir (par exemple, 1 pour seulement le turn, 2 pour le turn et la river).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de próximas cartas comunitarias a repartir (ej., 1 solo para el turn, 2 para turn y river).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد البطاقات المشتركة القادمة التي سيتم توزيعها (مثل 1 للدوران فقط، 2 للدوران والنهر).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
